storyHook: 说出心情，倾听回应，互相理解

narrative.when: 周四晚上，甲心里有事没说出来
narrative.who: 甲（倾诉的人）· 乙（好朋友）
narrative.how: 一边走一边慢慢说出心里的想法
narrative.method: 说出心情、乙耐心倾听、给出安慰或建议、心情慢慢平复
narrative.event: 甲今天工作上遇到了不顺心的事，需要找人说说

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I had a hard day at work.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh? What went wrong?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They said I did wrong, but it was not my doing.
turns.zh: 他们说我做错了，可那不是我的问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is rough. Did you get a chance to say your side?
turns.zh: 那真够呛。你有机会说清楚吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No one would let me talk. I kept it all in.
turns.zh: 没人肯听我说，我一直憋在心里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a hard thing to go through on your own.
turns.zh: 真难过，你得一个人扛着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is better now that I am talking about it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good to say. I am here for you.
turns.zh: 你愿意说就好，我在这儿听着呢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am a bit lighter now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Let us walk a little more.
turns.zh: 那就好，我们再走一会儿吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It was like no one saw me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I okay and I get you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I only needed one person to see.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now I do. Go on if you like.
turns.zh: 现在我知道了。你愿意就接着说。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is enough for now. Thank you.
turns.zh: 现在这样就够了。谢谢你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am pleased you said it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It was hard to say at first.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: But you did it. That is strong.
turns.zh: 但你说出来了，这很勇敢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am not so tight now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A walk and a talk is all we need.
turns.zh: 有时候走走说说就够了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are right. I will keep that in mind.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, let's get a warm drink.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds good. My throat is dry.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There is a place down the road.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us go there. I am ready.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good thing you said.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Me too. It was hard at first.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us get a cold plate as well?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, that is a good idea.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am pleased we came here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Me too. The air is good for talking.
turns.zh: 我也是，这空气适合聊天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are a good friend.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So are you. Now get on with your food.
turns.zh: 你也是。快吃你的东西吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. This place makes me happy.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was not happy at work today.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is the trouble? Let me have it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They said I did wrong. It was not my doing.
turns.zh: 他们说我做错了。其实不是我做的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is hard. Did you say your side?
turns.zh: 那挺难受的。你解释了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I said my bit, but no one gave ear.
turns.zh: 我说了我的想法，但没人听。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a sad thing for you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It helped to say it out loud.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You see I am with you, right?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I do. Thank you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us walk a bit more.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was so shut up all day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is not good for the mind.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now I see it was not so great a thing.
turns.zh: 现在看其实不是什么大事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: But it seemed very great then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I had the same last month.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What did you do?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I said it to a friend, like you are doing now.
turns.zh: 我也跟朋友说了，就像你现在这样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is good to have someone who gives ear.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are that someone for me.
turns.zh: 你就是那个听我说话的人。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then I am happy to be here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, i am not so tight now.
turns.zh: 我现在没那么憋得慌了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Talking makes it less.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are right. It was like a stone in my chest.
turns.zh: 你说得对。之前像胸口压了块石头。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have been there. It is a hard feeling.
turns.zh: 我也有过。那种感觉很难受。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How did you get through it?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I let time do its work. And I had a good sleep.
turns.zh: 让时间慢慢过去，再好好睡一觉。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sleep sounds like a good idea.
turns.zh: 睡觉听起来是个好主意。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. And tomorrow is a new day.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep that in mind.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now let us go get some warm food.
turns.zh: 好。那我们去吃点热乎的吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds good. I would like a warm plate.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. There is a place down the road.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do they have soft food? Not too sharp.
turns.zh: 他们有清淡的吗？不要太辣。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, they keep it simple and soft.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. I am ready for some comfort.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A good meal will make you better.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope so. Today was a long day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is over now. You did well.
turns.zh: 现在都过去了。你做得很好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you for walking with me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Any time. That is what friends are for.
turns.zh: 随时。朋友就是干这个的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am feeling much better now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Talking helps, does it not?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I was keeping it all inside.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do not do that. Let it out.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have a go. You are a good friend.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are the same. We be safe of one another.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am ready to go to my house now.
turns.zh: 我现在准备回我房子了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us get a warm drink first?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds good. A tea would be pleasing.
turns.zh: 听起来不错。来杯茶挺好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Come on then. My turn to put the money down.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am feeling better now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, good. Talking helps, does it not?
turns.zh: 那就好。说出来有用，对吧？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I see things better.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. You are strong.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not so strong. But I have you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And I have you. That is what friends are for.
turns.zh: 我也有你。朋友就是这样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get some rest tonight.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will. Let us get that tea now.
turns.zh: 会的。我们现在去喝茶吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Two cups of tea, please.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Coming up. You are all right now.

storyBlurb: 甲在工作中受了委屈，却一直闷在心里。直到周四晚上散步时，才在好友乙的倾听下慢慢说出心事，最终感到释然。
storyScript:
【开场·倾诉心情】周四的夜晚，路灯在小路上投下柔和的光。甲和乙并肩走着，脚步比平时慢了些。甲低着头，手指无意识地绞着衣角，终于开口说，今天心里堵得慌。乙没有催促，只是放慢了步子，侧过头，目光安静地落在甲的脸上。甲的声音有些发涩，断断续续地讲起白天的事——会议上被误解，明明不是自己的错，却没人听解释。那些话在喉咙里憋了一整天，现在说出来，像卸下了一块石头。乙轻轻嗯了一声，脚步没停，却离甲更近了些。

【进行·倾听回应】乙没有急着给建议，只是安静地听着。偶尔问一句，后来呢？或者，你当时怎么想的？甲说着说着，声音渐渐平稳，眼眶却红了。乙从口袋里掏出一张纸巾，默默递过去。路灯下，两个人的影子拉得很长，时而交叠。乙说，我明白那种感觉，被人误会真的很难受。甲吸了吸鼻子，第一次觉得有人真的懂了。乙没有说大道理，只是分享了自己类似的经历——那次也是被冤枉，后来怎么一点点想开的。甲听着，心里的结似乎松动了些。

【进行·互相理解】甲停下来，看着远处的灯火，说，其实我知道不是大事，就是需要有人说说话。乙笑了，拍拍甲的肩膀，说，以后别一个人扛着。甲也笑了，眼眶还湿着，但心里暖了。两个人继续往前走，聊起了别的事——周末的计划，喜欢的音乐。甲觉得脚步轻快了许多，连晚风都变得温柔。乙忽然说，你知道吗？你刚才说出来的时候，眼睛里有光了。甲愣了一下，然后笑出声来。

【收束·情绪平复】走到路口，两人该分开了。甲深深吸了口气，说，谢谢你听我说这些。乙摆摆手，说，朋友不就是干这个的嘛。甲转身走了几步，又回头，看见乙还站在原地，冲自己挥了挥手。甲心里那点委屈，已经散得差不多了。夜风拂过，甲加快了脚步，想着明天要好好吃顿热菜。原来，把心情说出来，真的会好很多。
